steps.title: Apply the zero product property
steps.content:
A product equals zero if and only if at least one factor equals zero.

Set the first factor equal to zero:
$$3x + 8 = 0$$
$$3x = -8$$
$$x = -\frac{8}{3}$$

Set the second factor equal to zero:
$$4x - 3 = 0$$
$$4x = 3$$
$$x = \frac{3}{4}$$

steps.title: Match the solutions to the given choices
steps.content: Among the given choices, $x = -\frac{8}{3}$ appears as an option. That matches choice A — A is correct.
